calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Kilduff, Esq. 415-673-0368 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Magda De Leon,415-368-5588, Defendant in Pro Per.
Spanish Interpreter Daniel Navarro assists Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Plaintiff submits on the papers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT MAGDA DE LEON.

Granted in part and Denied in Part. The money held by the Sheriff is to be released to the Judgment Creditor. The Judgment Debtor is to pay $50 per pay period towards the payment of the Judgment.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Brenda Crow, CSR#10503, bcrow@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Magda De Leon, Plaintiff appearing in pro per;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - DEFENDANT MAGDA DE LEON'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. The Sheriff is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
